leadText: The Yellow Flute (Japanese: きいろビードロ Yellow Vidro) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation III. It is one of the flutes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation III to Generation IV 1.2 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of confusion . Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Yellow Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of confusion.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E Colo XD A glass flute that snaps Pok é mon out of confusion. FR LG A yellow glass flute that snaps one Pok é mon out of confusion. D P Pt HG SS A yellow flute made from blown glass. Its melody snaps a single Pokémon out of confusion. B W B2 W2 A toy flute made from yellow glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A lovely toy flute to admire. It's made from yellow glass. OR AS S M US UM A flute made from yellow glass that snaps Pokémon out of confusion. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A flute made from yellow glass. It snaps Pokémon out of confusion.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation III to Generation IV 1.2.2 Generation V and Pokémon X and Y 1.2.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS N/A $ 150 S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Yellow Flute can be sold to the billionaire maniac in Undella Town for $ 7500. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of confusion . Generation V and Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Yellow Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in battle, it snaps a Pokémon out of confusion.
